arts.ttl: Match Preview: Borussia Dortmund Host the Bundesliga’s Best Team, Mainz
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund return to Bundesliga action tomorrow against the league’s best team, FC Mainz O5. Mainz are playing a dynamic style, have a fantastic away record, and will come into tomorrow’s match with confidence.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund considered January swoop for Monaco’s Caio Henrique
arts.sum: AS Monaco full-back Caio Henrique (27) almost made a move to Borussia Dortmund late in the January transfer window, according to a report from L’Équipe. At the time of the approach,…

arts.ttl: Preview: Borussia Dortmund vs. Mainz 05 - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Bundesliga clash between Borussia Dortmund and Mainz 05, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
